languages.text: {n}Вы подныриваете под удар, и лезвие рассекает кожу и мышцы на лопатке. Каждое движение вызывает ослепительную, мучительную вспышку боли. Ваши удары теряют четкость, становясь лишь опаснее.{/n}

{n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы подныриваете под удар, и лезвие рассекает кожу и мышцы на лопатке. Каждое движение вызывает ослепительную, мучительную вспышку боли. Ваши удары теряют четкость, становясь лишь опаснее.{/n}

{n}You duck under the blow, and the blade cuts through the skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes you a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. But even that cannot stop you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}相手の攻撃をかわし、肩の筋肉を切られた。あらゆる動きが激痛を伴う。しかし、それでも立ち止まることはできない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the blow, and the blade cuts through the skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes you a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. But even that cannot stop you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 攻撃をかわし、肩の筋肉を切られた。あらゆる動きが激痛を伴う。しかし、それでも立ち止まることはできない。

languages.text: {n}Vous vous baissez sous le bras tendu du colonel, dont le couteau entaille votre omoplate jusqu'au muscle. Le moindre mouvement provoque une douleur lancinante, et vos attaques se font moins précises, mais plus féroces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous baissez sous le bras tendu du colonel, dont le couteau entaille votre omoplate jusqu'au muscle. Le moindre mouvement provoque une douleur lancinante, et vos attaques se font moins précises, mais plus féroces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eğilerek darbeden kaçınmaya çalışıyorsun. Bıçak, kürek kemiğinin deriyi ve kası kesiyor. Artık her hareket; kör edici, dayanılmaz bir acının saplanmasına neden oluyor. Vuruşların isabetliliğini yitirip daha tehlikeli bir hâl alıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eğilerek darbeden kaçınmaya çalışıyorsun. Bıçak, kürek kemiğinin deriyi ve kası kesiyor. Artık her hareket; kör edici, dayanılmaz bir acının saplanmasına neden oluyor. Vuruşların isabetliliğini yitirip daha tehlikeli bir hâl alıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du duckst dich unter dem Hieb weg und die Klinge durchschneidet die Haut und Muskeln deines Schulterblattes. Jede deiner Bewegung verursacht nun unerträgliche Schmerzen. Deine Schläge verlieren an Präzision und werden dadurch noch gefährlicher.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du duckst dich unter dem Hieb weg und die Klinge durchschneidet die Haut und Muskeln deines Schulterblattes. Jede deiner Bewegung verursacht nun unerträgliche Schmerzen. Deine Schläge verlieren an Präzision und werden dadurch noch gefährlicher.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Te agachas bajo su ataque y el filo de su cuchillo corta la piel y el músculo de tu hombro. Cada movimiento te causa una punzada cegadora e insufrible de dolor. Tus ataques pierden precisión, pero eso solo los vuelve más peligrosos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Te agachas bajo su ataque y el filo de su cuchillo corta la piel y el músculo de tu hombro. Cada movimiento te causa una punzada cegadora e insufrible de dolor. Tus ataques pierden precisión, pero eso solo los vuelve más peligrosos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你俯身闪避了这一击，刀刃却还是划开了肩胛处的皮肉。现在每个动作都会引发令人晕眩难忍的剧痛。你的攻击失去了准度，却也因此变得更加危险。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You duck under the strike, and the blade cuts through skin and muscle on your shoulder blade. Every movement now causes a blinding, excruciating lance of pain. Your strikes lose their precision, only to become more dangerous.{/n}
